name: Smart FAQ Builder
tagline: Product URL → 20 real-customer FAQs with objection-handling answers + schema markup
description: Scrapes any product page and generates benefit-oriented FAQs that reduce support tickets and boost SEO. Outputs structured FAQ sets organized by theme, JSON-LD schema markup for rich snippets, Shopify-ready HTML, chatbot training CSV, and an objection-handling subset targeting price, returns, warranty, and delivery concerns.
outputs: Structured FAQ set organized by theme
